overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior running through a vibrant autumn forest with red maple leaves. The character travels along a dirt path beside a river, transitioning from a shaded forest corridor to a golden hour sunset over rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: autumn forest trail with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: samurai warrior jogging steadily along the forest path between rocky walls and wooden fencing

entered.detail: vibrant crimson autumn foliage lining both sides of the path
weathered wooden posts and rails running alongside the right side of the path
tall pale rock formations with patches of grass on the left side
narrow earthen trail covered with fallen red leaves
distant mountain peaks with white snow visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow forest trail enclosed by rocky walls on the left and a wooden fence on the right. The samurai character runs forward along the dirt path covered in fallen crimson maple leaves, with dense autumn foliage creating a canopy overhead and snow-capped mountains visible in the distant background.

events.description: wooden fence ends and river becomes visible through the trees on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the forest opens to reveal a body of water

entered.detail: calm blue water visible through gaps in the trees on the right side
trees with green foliage mixed among the red maples

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the wooden fence disappears behind and the forest opens to reveal a river on the right. The path curves slightly, bringing green-leaved trees into view on the left while the rocky cliffs recede into the distance, transitioning from an enclosed trail to a more open riverside environment.

events.description: sun appears directly on the left causing lens flare and long shadows across the path

agents.ego_description: running along the water's edge with the sun low and bright on the left side

entered.detail: bright sun creating lens flare and dramatic backlighting through the trees

segments.scene_description: The path runs alongside the river with full sky visibility. The sun sits low on the left, creating intense lens flares and casting long shadows of the trees across the dirt path. The rocky cliffs are now behind as the character moves through a more open area with mixed green and red foliage.

events.description: path changes from dirt to rocky terrain as character climbs upward
sunset creates intense golden orange lighting across the landscape

agents.ego_description: climbing up rocky outcrops and boulders as the sun sets ahead

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders and uneven rock surface replacing the dirt path
dark fallen tree trunks and debris scattered on the rocks
bright orange and yellow sunset glowing intensely on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to rocky terrain as the character climbs upward away from the river. The ground becomes uneven gravel and boulders, with the river now visible in the distance to the left. The sun sets directly ahead, bathing the entire scene in intense golden-orange light with the sky transitioning to warm sunset hues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shaded autumn forest that gradually opens into a vast, sun-drenched rocky landscape at sunset. It begins on a narrow dirt trail enclosed by rocky walls and a wooden fence, with the samurai running beneath a dense canopy of crimson maple leaves toward distant snow-capped mountains. As the character progresses, the fence disappears and the forest opens to reveal a river on the right, shifting the environment from a confined corridor to an open riverside path lined with mixed green and red foliage. The scene then expands under a wide sky where a low sun creates intense lens flares and casts long shadows across the trail before the terrain turns toward uneven gravel and boulders. Finally, the camera climbs upward away from the river, bathing the entire rocky vista in intense golden-orange light as the sun sets directly ahead.
